nodes.name: Cauca Valley montane forests
nodes.summary: The Cauca Valley montane forests (NT0109) is an ecoregion in western Colombia.

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Ultramarine grosbeak
nodes.summary: Ultramarine grosbeak（Ultramarine grosbeak，学名 Cyanoloxia brissonii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 南美洲
nodes.summary: 南美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联190种鸟类，包括小美洲鸵、大美洲鸵、北山䳍等190种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in a wide range of semi-open habitats in eastern and central South America, with a disjunct population in northern South America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: An isolated population can be found in southwestern Colombia, between the Western and Central cordilleras throughout the Cauca valley and Dagua regions, where they prefer dry forest borders and semi-arid desert
